function reportHmrLatency(sendMessage, updatedModules, startMsSinceEpoch, endMsSinceEpoch, hasUpdate = true) {
    const latencyMs = endMsSinceEpoch - startMsSinceEpoch;
    console.log(`[Fast Refresh] done in ${latencyMs}ms`);
    if (!hasUpdate) {
        return;
